name: Urja Global Limited
summary: Urja Global Limited engages in the design, consultancy, integration, supply, installation, commissioning, and maintenance of off grid and grid connected solar power plants and decentralized solar applications in India. It offers solar, e-rickshaw, automotive, and inverter batteries; solar inverters; LED street, flood, and panel lights, as well as LED bulbs and slim LED panel lights; PV modules; solar water heaters; solar lanterns; solar power packs; solar home lighting systems; and solar charge controllers. The company also provides electric vehicles. Urja Global Limited was incorporated in 1992 and is based in New Delhi, India.
